name: Pork Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds pork stew meat, cut into 1-1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan coated with nonstick cooking spray, brown pork; drain. Remove meat and set aside.
2. In the same pan, bring 1-1/4 cups water, bouillon and paprika to boil.
3. Add pork, onion and garlic. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 45 minutes or until meat is tender.
4. Combine cornstarch and remaining water; gradually add to pan, stirring constantly.
5. Bring to a boil; cook and stir 2 minutes or until thickened.
6. Remove from heat; stir in sour cream and parsley.
7. Serve over noodles.
